ogTitle: Sunbury vs Sunderland Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sunbury and Sunderland Bay.
heading: Sunbury vs Sunderland Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sunbury, Victoria and Sunderland Bay, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sunbury has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Sunderland Bay (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sunbury or Sunderland Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sunbury has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Sunderland Bay scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sunbury scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Sunderland Bay scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sunbury or Sunderland Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sunbury has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
